name: Favorite Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub all sides of the meat with salt, seasoned salt, seasoned pepper, and paprika.
2. Place the seasoned beef in the crockpot along with the onion and bouillon.
3. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours or until the meat is tender.
4. Remove the meat from the pot; slice it.
5. Makes 6 to 8 servings. If gravy is preferred, thicken the juices with flour dissolved in a small amount of water after removing the meat from the pot. If desired, vegetables such as potatoes, carrots, small white onions, or celery may be added with bouillon and cooked for the same time as the meat.
